comments.html:
> It looks like you can configure EVPN-with-VXLAN in some prior releases, but it doesn’t work (well?)

It does, we had it running in production even on 16.12.x (though that was on ASR1k's, I'm not sure if the virtual version has some quirks that make it impossible).
comments.name: Andras

comments.html: I'd be interested to get your take on Border Spine implementations, since Cisco supports it. The next-hop unchanged stuff becomes real fun when that topology is introduced, especially in a multi-tenant (VRF) design.
comments.name: Jeremy Mann

comments.html: Yeah, I also had "interesting" problems with 17.13. Most of them magically disappeared with 17.16.01a.
comments.name: Ivan Pepelnjak

comments.html:
from my 2-day-log fighting with transit VNI and symmetrical IRB on C8000v:
PEs failing to install ARP entries from type2 remote routes - no inter-BD connectivity bw clients on different PEs. SW 17.13.1a
after upgrade to latest 17.18.2 all started to work.
comments.name: Andrii Oliinyk
